hero-section.headline: Empowering Organizations with Trusted Technology Solutions in Egypt & Beyond
hero-section.description: Since 1988, ACT has been at the forefront of Egypt's ICT sector, delivering innovative technology solutions and trusted services that empower businesses, governments, and communities to thrive.

solutions-page-hero.headline: Smart, Secure, and Scalable Solutions, Tailored for the Digital Future
solutions-page-hero.description: At ACT, we deliver holistic technology ecosystems designed to empower enterprises, governments, and industries.
solutions-page-hero.subDescription: From digital modernization and hybrid IT to AI-powered networking and Zero Trust cybersecurity, our solutions ensure your operations are always connected, protected, and ready for what's next.

solutions.title: Digital Solutions Section
solutions.subtitle: AI & Automation
solutions.shortDescription: AI-powered platforms, automation tools, and data analytics that drive smarter decisions and better customer experiences. We help organizations unlock efficiency, speed, and competitive advantage through intelligent digital transformation.
solutions.pageTitle: Streamline operations, unlock agility, and drive innovation.
solutions.pageDescription: ACT's Digital Solutions empower enterprises to transform how they work through smarter systems, automated platforms, and real-time insights. From virtualization and disaster recovery to IoT connectivity and AI-driven monitoring, we help organizations modernize their digital core and stay resilient in a rapidly changing world.

solutions.title: Networking Solutions Section
solutions.subtitle: Enterprise Networks
solutions.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade networks designed for mobility, IoT readiness, and agile business operations. Our solution ensure network security, uptime, and business continuity at every stage of growth.
solutions.pageTitle: AI-Powered Networking Solutions for a Connected, Secure, and Scalable Future
solutions.pageDescription: ACT delivers enterprise-grade networking solutions that empower organizations to stay connected, secure, and future-ready. We design intelligent, cloud-ready infrastructures that combine performance, visibility, and automation, all built on partnerships with Cisco, HPE Aruba, Altai, and Nokia. From campuses and data centers to industrial sites and hybrid clouds, ACT ensures seamless communication and resilience across every environment.

solutions.title: Hybrid IT section
solutions.subtitle: Cloud & On-Premises
solutions.shortDescription: Future-ready infrastructure that balances flexibility, cost-efficiency, and scalability. ACT enables seamless cloud migration while maintaining secure on-premises systems for critical workloads.
solutions.pageTitle: Powering Business Agility with Intelligent, Scalable Infrastructure
solutions.pageDescription: ACT's Hybrid IT Solutions enable enterprises to modernize their IT foundations with the right balance of on-premises performance, cloud flexibility, and edge scalability. We help organizations design and deploy resilient compute, storage, and endpoint systems that deliver seamless integration, operational efficiency, and long-term value.

solutions.title: Cybersecurity Solutions Section
solutions.subtitle: Security & Compliance
solutions.shortDescription: Advanced security against evolving digital threats. ACT's cybersecurity services comply with ISO, NTRA, and GDPR standards to safeguard enterprises, banks, and government organizations.
solutions.pageTitle: Zero Trust Security for a Borderless World
solutions.pageDescription: In today's hyperconnected world, trust must be earned, not assumed. At ACT, we empower organizations to safeguard their digital ecosystems through next-generation cybersecurity solutions rooted in a Zero Trust framework. By integrating AI, machine learning, and threat intelligence, we help enterprises continuously protect users, data, and applications wherever they operate.
solutions.additionalContent:
ACT's Zero Trust model secures every digital interaction, validating identity, assessing context, and protecting assets across your IT environment.

This adaptive approach ensures that every user, device, and application interaction is continuously verified, minimizing risk and maximizing business continuity.

services-page-hero.headline: Building Smarter, Safer, and Scalable IT with ACT
services-page-hero.description: Supporting Your Business Every Step of the Way with Reliable, Secure, and Scalable Services.
services-page-hero.subDescription: ACT delivers end-to-end IT services tailored to your business needs, from infrastructure management and digital transformation to cybersecurity and managed operations.

services.label: Infrastructure Services
services.pageTitle: The Foundation of Every IT Environment
services.pageDescription: Ensuring your business runs smoothly, securely, and efficiently with enterprise-grade infrastructure.

items.title: Computing
items.description: High-performance servers and storage powering critical applications.

items.title: Operating Systems (O.S.)
items.description: Expert management of Windows, Linux & hybrid environments.

items.title: Active Directory (AD)
items.description: Centralized identity & permissions management.

items.title: Virtualization
items.description: Maximize resources with virtualized systems to cut costs.

items.title: VDI
items.description: Secure remote desktop access for a mobile workforce.

services.label: Digital Transformation Services
services.pageDescription: Transform your business with cutting-edge digital solutions and automation.

items.title: Data Protection & Continuity
items.description: Ensure business continuity with robust data protection strategies.

items.title: Application Performance Monitoring (APM)
items.description: Monitor and optimize application performance in real-time.

items.title: IT Operations Management (ITOM)
items.description: Streamline IT operations with intelligent management tools.

items.title: Automation & AI Workflows
items.description: Automate processes with AI-powered workflow solutions.

items.title: AI Powered Chatbots
items.description: Enhance customer experience with intelligent chatbot solutions.

services.label: Security Services
services.pageDescription: World-class cybersecurity services to protect your business from evolving threats.

items.title: Red Team Services
items.description: Ethical hacking and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.

items.title: Firewalls & NAC
items.description: Network access control and advanced firewall protection.

items.title: 24/7 SOC
items.description: Around-the-clock security operations center monitoring.

items.title: Mail Security
items.description: Protect your email communications from threats.

items.title: Endpoint Detection (EDR/XDR)
items.description: Advanced endpoint detection and response capabilities.

items.title: SIEM & SOAR Solutions
items.description: Security information and event management with orchestration.

items.title: DNS Security
items.description: Protect your DNS infrastructure from attacks.

items.title: SASE
items.description: Cloud-based secure access service edge solutions.

services.label: Data Center Services
services.pageDescription: Build and maintain world-class data centers with best-in-class infrastructure.

items.title: Power & Backup Systems
items.description: Reliable power infrastructure with backup solutions.

items.title: Civil Preparation & Cabling
items.description: Professional infrastructure setup and cabling services.

items.title: Fire Protection & Suppression
items.description: Advanced fire detection and suppression systems.

items.title: Access Control & CCTV
items.description: Comprehensive security monitoring and access management.

items.title: Cooling & Lighting Systems
items.description: Optimal environmental control for data centers.

services.label: Managed Operations
services.pageTitle: Focus on Growth, We Handle IT
services.pageDescription: Comprehensive managed services that reduce costs and complexity.

items.title: Fully Managed Services
items.description: End-to-end IT outsourcing.

items.title: Co-Managed Services
items.description: Augment your existing IT team.

items.title: Professional Services
items.description: On-demand project-based support.

articles.description: Follow the story of Aaron Swartz, the boy who could change the world
